text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
Nothing beats getting first place! 
It's the greatest feeling.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
Cutting through the wind and gaining the 
lead… no matter how many times I experience 
this, something starts welling up within my 
chest every time.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
I was able to see a great scenery. 
How about you?
choice_data_list: Ahh, you showed me the greatest view!
Yeah, you showed me the greatest view!
I want to see an even greater scenery

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
I was able to see a great scenery. 
How about you?
choice_data_list: Ahh, you showed me the greatest view!
Yeah, you showed me the greatest view!
I want to see an even greater scenery

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
Hahahah! C'mon now, you're looking 
way more chipper than me right now.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
Well, we only gained this victory 
because we worked together.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
Thank you! Let's go all out 
and celebrate today!

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
Haha! We're already talking about 
our next destination huh.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
That's good. That feeling is precisely what 
guides me on this journey.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
Look forward to it. I'll aim somewhere 
even higher next time.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
Let's go somewhere even further… 
to witness an endless scenery.
